reviews.review_description:
It's a good game with a fun game mode of earth bending and fire bending but the player base is small 
I can't find a match to a room if anyone wants to play lemme know (dms)
It won’t let me play with no one else

Whoever is making this game… I want you to know… YOU’RE COOKING! I’m literally so excited for the full release! I hope you lean into better graphics, but not in the way you think. I think the best graphics this game could have would be VERY cartoony. And I think that would be really nice. The overall graphics are just pretty pixelated if that makes sense.
To the dev:
I hope you have a great day, and keep cooking!
This game is really cool the developer just needs to fix the bugs
The games seems fun and pretty smooth for just launching but I can't find real games. I don't know if it's because no one play or what but it says room not found

developer_response.body: Hello! The player base is still small at the moment but it is increasing day by day!

reviews.review_description: Recently i downloaded it but I was trying to do the multiplayer mode thing and it didn’t work. Can someone help me?

developer_response.body: Hello, if you are trying to join random and couldn't find a room, it's most likely due to a small player base at the moment so there's no rooms made. You can invite a friend to play with you in the meantime but the player base is steadily growing!

reviews.review_description: The game is really fun but there are some bugs like how the enter code thing dosent work and no one plays it

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! I will get the enter code bug fixed on the next version.

-UPDATE-
Enter code bug has now been fixed!

reviews.review_description: I love the mechanics the way the fire bending and earth bending work I just want to know when the full release game is out because I really wanna see the full game of this. Also, I can’t find anyone online lol. also maybe integrate some NPC matches because I feel like they’d be very helpful for the entire community.

developer_response.body: Full game hopefully will be out by end of summer! Adding AI opponents will be something I will put some thoughts in (leaning on adding it!)

reviews.review_description:
I don’t think I’ve ever has as much fun in vr in my life! The mechanics are great and feel very responsive! I really wish there were more people online because this game is amazing!!
Please try this game!! 


Also when is the full release coming?
I like the game, except for some reason it won’t let me fight with other people

developer_response.body: Hello, the player base is still pretty small at the moment so there might not be anyone available when you searched for a room. You can invite your friend to play with you in the meantime as well
